zh.lifeSummary: Catherina Ap Jenkins於1350年出生在英國威爾斯。她於1380年與Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan在威爾士格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Catherina Ap Jenkins于1350年出生在英国威尔斯。她于1380年与Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan在威尔士格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Jenkins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Jenkin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Jenkins is one of the most common surnames in England, especially southwestern England, but is also especially associated with Wales.

variants.name: Jenkin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal names Jankin, Jenkin, and Jonkin, pet forms of Jan, Jen, and Jon + the hypocoristic suffix -kin. In Middle English, names in -kin were often used to name the younger of two family members with the same personal name.

variants.name: Jinkins
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of   Jenkins  .

nameMeanings.name: Catherina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catharine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: Catherina Ap Jenkins was born in 1350, in Wales, United Kingdom. She married Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan in 1380, in Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Catherina Ap Jenkins est née en 1350, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan en 1380, à Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Catherina Ap Jenkins wurde 1350 in Wales, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1380 in Glamorgan, Wales Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Catherina Ap Jenkins è nata il nel 1350 nel Galles, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan nel 1380, nel Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Glamorgan, Wales: ウェールズグラモーガン
ja.lifeSummary: Catherina Ap Jenkinsは1350年にイギリスウェールズで生まれた。1380年にウェールズグラモーガンでGrono Ap Ivor Hir Vachanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherina Ap Jenkins(은)는 1350년 영국 웨일스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1380년 웨일스 글램르건에서 Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Catherina Ap Jenkins nasceu em 1350, em Gales, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan em 1380, em Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Catherina Ap Jenkins родилась в 1350 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan в 1380 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Catherina Ap Jenkins nació en 1350, en Gales, Reino Unido. Se casó con Grono Ap Ivor Hir Vachan en 1380, en Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
